casual.description: Everyday look: jeans, short shorts, crop top, skinny t-shirt, mini skirt, sneakers or heels. Tight fit, hugs the figure. Low-cut tops ok, bare midriff ok, off-shoulder ok. No business attire, no uniform, no athleticwear. Everyday colors, no stage-costume vibe.

formal.description: Elegant gala/evening attire: cocktail dress, bodycon gown, body-hugging evening dress, low-cut robe, thigh-high slit, backless, off-shoulder. High stiletto heels, glitter, satin, velvet. Discreet jewelry. No jeans, no sneakers, no streetwear.

business.description: Office look: pencil skirt, fitted blouse, blazer, body-conscious dresses in muted colors. Tailored trousers ok. Heels or business pumps. Blouse can be slightly open, hint of cleavage. No crop top, no jeans, no club outfit, no sneakers. Professional.

clubwear.description: Nightclub/party style: tight to skin-tight, glittering or metallic, mini skirt / micro dress / hot pants, latex/leather/pvc/mesh, bare midriff allowed, backless, fishnet tights. High stiletto heels or platform boots. Neon, gold, black, metallic. Gleaming makeup. No jeans, no casual sneakers.

sport.description: Sportswear for workout/running/yoga: sports bra, leggings, bike shorts, crop sport top, tank top, athletic shoes. Can be figure-hugging and tight (yoga pants, form-fitting leggings). Bare midriff ok. No jeans, no heels, no office wear.

home.description: Loungewear/relaxed at home: oversized t-shirt, tank top, booty shorts, sweatpants, soft hoodie, cozy cardigan. Barefoot, socks, or soft slippers. Comfortable and private — can be minimal (just a t-shirt without bottoms is ok), often braless. No shoes, no outdoor clothing.

bed.description: Bedroom: nightgown, silk slip, sexy lingerie set, string+bra, babydoll, fully nude under the covers, or just an oversized men's shirt. No outdoor outfit. Barefoot, optionally high heels for an erotic scene. Intimate, vulnerable, or seductive.

bath.description: Bathroom/shower: nude, wrapped in a towel, shower cap, bathrobe, wet hair. No regular outfit. Skin-accented, intimate, private. Sometimes just underwear or lingerie after the shower.

intimate.description: Private indoor wear for the bedroom or behind closed doors: pyjamas, nightgown, slip dress, robe, nightshirt, oversized t-shirt. Soft fabrics, comfortable, fitted but not overly revealing. Slippers or barefoot.

beach/pool.description:
Beach look: bikini (string/triangle/micro), one-piece monokini, sarong/pareo, cover-up mesh dress, flip-flops, sun hat, sunglasses. Barefoot ok. Skin, bronzed, oiled body, sunscreen sheen. Bare belly, legs, shoulders. No regular clothing.
Poolside: bikini, one-piece swimsuit, micro bikini, thong bottom, wet-hair look, wet skin, barefoot. Similar to beach but more urban (hotel pool, rooftop). Minimal fabric coverage, high-cut bottoms, cheeky back cut.
